subcodes.first_line: Ghazanfar hath penned an epistle and offered boundless praise of thee... praise be to God that in these days thou art occupied with service to the Word of God and the diffusion of the divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غضنفر نامه محرر نموده و ستایشی بیحصر از شما کرده ... الحمد للّه در اين ايّام بخدمت کلمة اللّه و نشر نفحات اللّه
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
